title: post api auth login with valid credentials
description: Verify that POST /api/auth/login with valid username and password returns HTTP 200 and a valid JWT token for authenticated sessions.

title: post api sales create new sale with valid items and token
description: Verify that POST /api/sales with a valid items array and a valid authentication token returns HTTP 200 with a SaleResponse confirming the sale.

title: get api products list all products with valid token
description: Verify that GET /api/products with a valid authentication token returns HTTP 200 with a list of Product objects representing the current product catalog.
